name: hubu
summary: Fitness HUD displaying BLE workout metrics like pace, heart rate, and cadence on Rokid glasses
description: hubu connects to BLE devices such as Garmin watches to show real-time workout data on Rokid glasses. It displays pace, heart rate, and cadence in a clear HUD format. The app automatically scans and connects to compatible devices supporting heart rate and running speed services.
author: hanabix

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
About hubu

hubu is a fitness HUD app for Rokid Glasses that connects to low-energy Bluetooth devices like Garmin watches to display real-time workout metrics.

Key features

- Displays pace (mm'ss"), heart rate (bpm), and cadence on the glasses
- Shows current time, connected device name, and glasses battery percentage
- Supports Heart Rate Service and Running Speed and Cadence Service over BLE
- Automatically scans and connects to compatible devices
- Provides a "Tap to Reconnect" option if no device is found

Known limitations

- Only supports running speed and cadence necessary measurements (speed and cadence)
- Does not support cycling speed, cadence, or power services
- Does not allow manual device selection

For more details, visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/hanabix/hubu).
